title: Create: Northstar - Redux
body:
# 🚀 Northstar Redux
Using Northstar you can build a rocket and expand your Create factory to different planets!

Build and superglue your own rocket and fly to different planets and moons, currently including Mars, Earth (you should already be there), the Moon, Venus and much more to come.
Explore abandoned bases on different planets and build your own.

### 📜 Differences with Northstar:
- Support for ⚙️ Create 6.0 and 🦊 NeoForge 1.21.1.
- Pondering for ease of access.
- Added a new material, Titanium to replace iron sheets, plates and pillars.
- Reworked progression, recipes and textures to better fit the Create/Minecraft themes.
- Bugfixes ranging from small rendering issues to complete crashes for a smoother experience.
- Improved indirect compatibility with other mods/addons through tags.
- Direct compatibility with Create, Create Copycats+, Create Crafts & Additions, Create Diesel Generators, Create The Factory Must Grow.
- Community provided translations, currently including Chinese, Japanese and Russian
- And much more to come!

### 💡 Issues/Suggestions/Planned features:
Everything happens on GitHub or [Discord](https://discord.gg/nn96VTzeqj)! Check the [readme](https://github.com/Astronauts-of-Create/Northstar-Redux?tab=readme-ov-file#issuessuggestions) and the [issues](https://github.com/Astronauts-of-Create/Northstar-Redux/issues)/[pull requests](https://github.com/Astronauts-of-Create/Northstar-Redux/pulls).

### 📖 Guide:
For beginners, [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) is recommended. Start by crafting and ponderinmodrino fiabout the rocket station. You should be able to find all the information you need in game using Ponder, JEI and the item tooltips. If not, you can always ask for help on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/nn96VTzeqj).

For modders/modpack/datapack creators wishing to create new planets, fuels or just add compatibility with Northstar, please check out the [wiki](https://github.com/Astronauts-of-Create/Northstar-Redux/wiki).

### ❗ Disclaimer:
Northstar Redux is a port and a continuation of [Northstar](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-northstar) for newer versions of Create.  
This is mod is still in early stages of development. Please report any issues you find on [GitHub](https://github.com/Astronauts-of-Create/Northstar-Redux/issues). Suggestions are also welcome.
